product_analysis: The product appears to be a minimalist round smart watch or modern wristwatch with a clean industrial design. Brand name and logo are not visible in the input image, and there is no readable text on the product. The watch has a circular silver metallic case with a smooth polished finish, thin bezel, and a fully black blank screen on the front-facing unit. The side profile shows small metallic lugs and subtle side button/crown details. The strap is matte white or very light gray silicone/rubber with a smooth texture, multiple elongated oval adjustment holes, and a matching white buckle/loop system. The image shows two views: one front-facing watch with black display and one rear-facing watch showing a plain circular back cover in the same silver tone. Key details that must be preserved exactly: round silver case shape, black circular display, white silicone strap, slim minimalist aesthetic, strap hole shape and placement style, metallic lugs, and overall no-logo clean appearance. The product must look EXACTLY like the input image, maintaining all original labels, colors, and branding details.

Bright soft studio lighting, modern commercial style, premium tech advertisement mood, clean light gray or white background, crisp focus, realistic materials, sharp details. The product must look EXACTLY like the input image, maintaining all original labels, colors, and branding details.
veo_video_prompt: Create an 8-second 9:16 vertical commercial video. CHARACTER DNA: Female Thai presenter, age 25-30, fair clean skin, cute petite build, soft oval face, bright expressive eyes, natural makeup, medium-length straight dark hair, wearing a neat white or light gray blouse, youthful and trustworthy commercial presence. PRODUCT: a minimalist round smart watch with a silver metallic circular case, thin bezel, black blank circular display, subtle side button details, white matte silicone strap with elongated oval adjustment holes, clean no-logo design, matching the input image exactly. The product packaging, logo, and color must remain identical to the starting frame. The product must look EXACTLY like the input image, maintaining all original labels, colors, and branding details. Scene direction: open with a close-up beauty shot of the watch in her hand, then she gently rotates the watch to reveal the silver case and white strap, followed by a medium shot of her naturally wearing or presenting it toward camera. Camera movement is smooth and premium, with slow push-in and subtle parallax. Lighting is bright soft studio lighting with clean commercial reflections that emphasize the metallic case and matte strap texture. Background is minimal light gray studio for a premium technology ad. Motion should remain elegant, realistic, and product-focused.
